Intro rubric one.
OPTION A: Alpha incipit

OPTION B: Bravo incipit
Body bravo line.
Middle rubric two.
Standalone body with emphasis inside it.
Amen.
OPTION A: A-two incipit

OPTION B: B-two incipit
Body b-two line.
OPTION C: No content option
